steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The pronoun refers to The Eiteljorg Museum. A museum is a singular institution, so the sentence needs a singular possessive pronoun for an institution's collection.

steps.title: Use the singular possessive
steps.content: Choice B treats the museum as a female person, Choice C means it is, and Choice D is plural. The remaining choice is the singular possessive form for an institution. The answer is A.
